# NeuFin — Agentic Portfolio Intelligence Platform
# https://neufin-web.vercel.app
# info@neufin.ai

## What NeuFin Does
NeuFin is an AI-powered investment intelligence platform that uses a
7-agent swarm (LangGraph) to analyze investment portfolios, detect
behavioral biases, compute institutional-grade metrics, and generate
IC-ready briefings in 60 seconds.

## Core Capabilities
- Portfolio DNA Scoring: HHI concentration, Sharpe ratio, weighted beta
- Behavioral Bias Detection: 47 biases including loss aversion, anchoring
- 7-Agent Swarm: Market Regime, Strategist, Quant, Tax, Risk, Alpha, Synthesizer
- IC-Grade Reports: Investment Committee briefings + PDF generation
- Market Intelligence: Macro regime detection, news intelligence, daily synthesis
- Research Hub: Daily AI-generated research published at /research

## Pricing
- Free: Portfolio DNA analysis (no account required, 3/day limit)
- 14-Day Trial: Full swarm access, IC reports, research feed
- Advisor ($299/month): Unlimited analyses, PDF reports, API access
- Enterprise: Custom pricing, white-label, dedicated support

## Company
Neufin OÜ — Registered in Estonia (EU HQ)
Neufin Inc. — Registered Office, United States
Operating in: Singapore, Malaysia, UAE, Thailand, Vietnam (2026)
Contact: info@neufin.ai

## Founders
Varun Srivastava — CEO, AI & Cybersecurity background
Ha Pham — CSO, 15+ years digital banking
Ray Nee — COO, Operations & partnerships

## Technical Stack
Backend: FastAPI (Python), Railway, Supabase, Redis
AI: Claude Sonnet 4.6, GPT-4o, Gemini Pro, LangGraph
Frontend: Next.js 15, Vercel

## Regulatory
MAS-aware (Singapore) | DFSA-aligned (UAE) | GDPR compliant (EU) |
SOC 2 Type II | SEC Reg S-P | FINRA 4512
